data.title: 国际服炸服 #23
data.summary: [8/5 (Tue) Temporary Maintenance Notice] Temporary maintenance will take place on the schedule below
data.body:
[8/5 (Tue) Temporary Maintenance Notice]

Temporary maintenance will take place on the schedule below to improve game stability and performance.
We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Schedule
8/5(Tue) 8:00 AM – 9:10 AM(UTC)

Effect
Unable to enter the game

Compensation
TBD

Details
Server stabilization.

More Info: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3077975
